chunks.text: HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD 1st Appeal No.79 of 2024 Present: Justice Jawad Akbar Sarwana Appellant: Basharat Ali Khan s/o Moazam Ali Khan, Through Mr.Saad Salman Ghani, Advocate Respondent: Muhammad Azhar s/o Muhammad Anwar Taak, Nemo. Date of hearing: 01.12.2025 Date of decision: 02.12.2025 O R D E R JAWAD AKBAR SARWANA, J.: For reasons to be recorded, the above-titled 1st appeal is dismissed. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
